subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam! Upon thee be My glory! Hearken thou unto My call, for verily it draweth thee nigh unto the One, the All-Informed. This Day hath another station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام علیک بهائی اسمع ندائی انه یقربک الی الفرد الخبیر این یوم را مقامی دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
